title: Shoals Technologies Group (SHLS) Gains Momentum on Clean Energy Demand
text: Shoals Technologies Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SHLS) is experiencing positive momentum driven by expanding clean energy demand. UBS upgraded its price target to $12 from $9 on November 5, citing a record project backlog as a sign of rising demand for clean energy and growth from data centers and the tech sector. The company reported strong third-quarter results on November 4: Revenue increased nearly 33% to $135.8 million. Gross profit more than doubled to $50.3 million. Operating income reached $18.7 million. Net income improved to $11.9 million. Adjusted EBITDA totaled $32 million. Most significantly, Shoals' backlog and awarded orders climbed to $720.9 million, reflecting growth in both domestic and international markets. Management expects Q4 revenue between $140-150 million, with adjusted EBITDA projected at $35-40 million. CEO Brandon Moss highlighted the company's momentum in utility-scale solar and expansion into emerging high-growth sectors, expressing confidence in continued success supported by recent production capacity investments. Shoals provides electrical balance-of-system solutions for solar, energy storage, and EV charging industries.
